documents.name: port_tv_app_to_vega.md
documents.excerpt:
## Purpose
Route TV migrations by detected app type and pass context through every phase.

## AI Agent Instructions
Read the selected workflow before editing. Do not invent Vega APIs. Keep unsupported mappings as explicit gaps. Preserve the plan, execute, build, and verification boundaries.

## Step 1: DETECT APP TYPE
Detect React Native from package.json instead of asking the developer to classify it.

## Step 3: DISPATCH
For a React Native source, use port_tv_app_to_vega_fos_rn_app.md.

documents.name: port_tv_app_to_vega_fos_rn_app.md
documents.excerpt:
## Purpose
Port a React Native TV app to a VegaScript app. Preserve portable JavaScript and TypeScript while replacing unsupported native integrations.

## Architecture
Validate the source, plan the mappings, then execute from the Vega React Native template. Build and device verification remain later phases.

## Library Compatibility Check
Inspect native dependencies and their peers. Record unsupported modules and workarounds instead of silently dropping features.

## Phase 2: PLAN
Map components, native modules, dependencies, and manifest behavior to Vega equivalents.

## Phase 3: EXECUTE
Create the Vega package from the template shape and apply the migration guide.
